author: stephen
body:
Question. I know I can buy Stand By Me (Playing for Change) in the video format on iTunes, but I’ve been trying to find just the audio (MP3) version. Any idea if it’s available and if so where I can buy it?  
Thanks.

author: Krishna
body:
Even I wanted the mp3 version of this song… after searching for long long time on the net, I finally found it in the link given below. I really love this song.. the video depicts the unity among us no matter u are black, white, asian, african, arabian, european, we all need somebody to stand by us….we as humans are one… should stand for ourselves and not fight within ourselves…

anyhow… here’s link

[http://rapidshare.com/files/174928591/Playing\_for\_Change\_-\_Stand\_by\_Me.mp3](http://rapidshare.com/files/174928591/Playing_for_Change_-_Stand_by_Me.mp3)
